strengths: Strong distributed-systems and high-throughput backend background, including real-time low-latency microservices handling millions of requests per second at Sociomantic.
Recent hands-on exposure to agentic AI infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq, showing awareness of the emerging stack relevant to the role.
Broad polyglot and multi-platform experience across embedded, mobile, web, and cloud systems, demonstrating adaptability and depth as an engineer.
concerns: No demonstrated engineering leadership experience — titles throughout are Senior/Staff Software Developer with no record of managing, hiring, or scaling engineering teams of any size.

Agentic AI experience is superficial and very recent (April 2025 to present as a developer contributor), falling well short of the required production multi-agent systems ownership at organizational scale.

No meaningful fintech-infrastructure depth in credit systems, payment flows, risk modeling, or regulated financial environments — RIDE Capital involvement was general product engineering, not fintech-infrastructure design.
response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a skilled and experienced individual contributor with genuine backend depth, but this role is an executive engineering leadership position requiring a proven track record of building and scaling engineering organizations, owning production agentic-AI systems, and operating within regulated fintech environments — none of which appear in the candidate's history. The gap between Staff Software Developer and CTO is not compensated by the breadth of technical experience, and the recency and scope of his agentic AI work do not approach the production ownership the role demands.
